summary: Lead starts M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 on branch chore/m5-web-windows-distributable after M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 entered main and was closed. The writer is a real release_engineer subagent. The task must produce local/smoke-only Web and unsigned Windows distributable evidence without weakening Electron security or expanding into release, store, accounts, telemetry, services, signing, branding, or public launch decisions.

spawned_thread.responsibility: primary release_engineer writer for M5 Web and unsigned Windows distributable smoke evidence

acceptance_focus: Local Web build and unsigned Windows Electron smoke package can launch the M5 slice and pass deterministic host hash/security canaries.
Electron keeps nodeIntegration=false, contextIsolation=true, sandbox=true, strict preload/IPC validation, and no arbitrary channel/path/shell-open exposure.

Web save/import/export and Electron save adapter behavior are smoke-tested without direct renderer filesystem access and without adding accounts, network services, telemetry, or release-store integration.
Evidence remains local/smoke-only and does not make a commercial release, store, branding, signing, telemetry, paid service, account, or public release decision.
required_tests: pnpm test:e2e or documented alias caveat if pnpm e2e is absent
Windows package smoke launches the M5 slice and verifies save/import/export boundaries plus host hash/security canary results
decisions: The writer may update only allowed paths and must not weaken Electron security to make smoke tests pass.

The task may record a PASS_WITH_LIMITS caveat if current save/import/export platform surfaces are narrower than the task wording, but any new IPC/file behavior must stay schema-validated and renderer-safe.
Do not mark ACCEPTED or CLOSED from the writer thread; route REVIEW to security_reviewer.
requested_action: Implement or gather the M5 Web/Windows distributable smoke evidence, run required gates, write REVIEW handoff, and route to security_reviewer.

tests_run.result: Clean main was confirmed before creating branch chore/m5-web-windows-distributable.
Task schema valid before START checkpoint.

risks: Task must not weaken Electron security or add arbitrary IPC/path/shell exposure to satisfy smoke evidence.
Task required_tests mentions pnpm e2e; repo actual script may be pnpm test:e2e and must be recorded if alias is absent.
M5 formal passage and manual node battle remain separate Human Gates.
